Tech Selloff Hits Markets | Open Interest 6/23/2026
articles.summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Global markets get a reality check as tech stocks slide again, while SpaceX fights to defend its $2 trillion valuation after three straight days of losses. Currency traders brace for potential yen intervention. Plus, Apollo caps withdrawals from a major private credit fund as redemption pressures build. And America's nuclear renaissance accelerates. Oklo Co-Founder and CEO Jake DeWitte joins Bloomberg Open Interest on the race to power the AI boom with next-generation reactors. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Waterways Leisure Tourism IPO: Issue receives tepid response on Day 01, subscribed 0.20x; GMP signals flat listing
articles.summary: Waterways Leisure Tourism's IPO opened on June 23 but saw low interest, being subscribed only 0.20 times. A total of 8.14 lakh shares were bid for against 39.82 lakh available. The company aims to raise  ₹585 crore, with a market valuation of  ₹5,849.48 crore post-issue.

The data shows no market capitalization, revenue, or net income, and states that UBCP has never paid dividends.

articles.title: Largest Independent Shareholder of SEACOR Marine Holdings Inc., Jorey Chernett, Calls on Board to Initiate Comprehensive Evaluation of Strategic Alternatives, Including a Sale of the Company or Dual-Track Fleet Sale
articles.summary: Jorey Chernett, the largest independent shareholder of SEACOR Marine Holdings Inc. (SMHI), has urged the company's board to explore strategic alternatives, including a sale of the company or a dual-track fleet sale. Chernett highlighted the severe discount of SMHI's stock to its net asset value, which he claims is over $20 per share, compared to the current trading price of $6.68. He proposed a sequential strategy to unlock shareholder value by aggressively cutting corporate overhead, immediately selling or relocating premium liftboats, and using the proceeds to pay down debt.

articles.title: DexCom, Insulet gain news Buys at Deutsche Bank (DXCM:NASDAQ)
articles.summary: Deutsche Bank has initiated coverage of Insulet (PODD) and DexCom (DXCM) with Buy ratings, leading to gains for the MedTech companies. This positive analyst action comes despite a recent sharp sell-off for these diabetes device makers.

articles.title: Truist Securities Lifts Price Target on Simon Property to $215 From $196, Maintains Hold Rating
articles.summary: Truist Securities has increased its price target for Simon Property Group (SPG) to $215 from $196, while maintaining a 'Hold' rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the firm regarding the commercial REIT. Other recent analyst actions on Simon Property Group include Scotiabank, Morgan Stanley, Evercore ISI, JPMorgan, BMO Capital, Mizuho, Barclays, Goldman Sachs, UBS, and Argus, with varying price targets and ratings.

articles.title: US Stocks Move | Nonferrous Metals Sector Broadly Declines; Freeport-McMoRan (FCX.US) Drops Over 7%
articles.summary: The nonferrous metals sector experienced a broad decline in US stocks, with Freeport-McMoRan (FCX.US) leading the losses with a drop of over 7%. This movement indicates a significant downturn for companies within this industry.

articles.title: SpaceX falls below IPO price before rebounding 2%: Is it a second-chance buying opportunity?
articles.summary: SpaceX shares rebounded 2% after falling below $150, impacting its market valuation under $2 trillion. After a $75 billion IPO, investor sentiment weakened, with SpaceX losing over $600 billion in value post-IPO. Despite the volatility, shares remain 10% above the $135 IPO price.

articles.title: Israel Weighs US IPO for Multi-Billion-Dollar Defense Companies
articles.summary: Israel is considering listing state-owned defense giants Israel Aerospace Industries Ltd. and Rafael Advanced Defense Systems Ltd. in the US to potentially avoid stricter disclosure obligations in the local market.

articles.title: Bitcoin teases $62K breakdown as analysis sees Micron earnings volatility next
articles.summary: Bitcoin stayed volatile while bulls tried to preserve support at local lows while stocks prepared for Micron forward earnings and digested Asia losses.

articles.title: Caterpillar Inc Stock (CAT) Moved Down by 3.61% on Jun 23: Facts Behind the Movement
articles.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (CAT) shares experienced a 3.61% dip on June 23, 2026, driven by broader market sell-offs, valuation concerns after a significant AI-driven rally, and investor profit-taking. Despite its recent surge to all-time highs due to its role in AI infrastructure through its Power and Energy division, the stock faces pressures from high valuation multiples, predicted tariff impacts of over $2 billion for fiscal year 2026, and notable insider stock sales. Technical indicators suggest close monitoring for investors.

articles.title: Autodesk (ADSK) Raises Borrowing Capacity Through Revolving Credit Facility Adjustments
articles.summary: Autodesk Inc. (NASDAQ: ADSK) has increased its borrowing capacity from $1.5 billion to $2 billion through adjustments to its Revolving Credit Facility, involving major banks. This expanded facility will support potential acquisitions, share buybacks, working capital, and capital expenditures. While RBC Capital recently lowered ADSK's price target due to concerns over its MaintainX acquisition, the firm maintains an Outperform rating, highlighting Autodesk's solid performance and leadership in industrial AI innovation.

articles.title: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) is One of the Oversold Stocks Offering Attractive Upside
articles.summary: Leidos Holdings Inc. (LDOS) has been identified as an oversold stock with attractive upside potential, despite a recent downgrade by Jefferies. The company recently secured four awards under the U.S. Department of State’s Evolve contract, aimed at modernizing IT systems for American diplomats globally, a deal valued up to $10 billion. While Jefferies lowered their price target and downgraded the stock to Hold, the revised target still suggests a nearly 29% upside.

articles.title: Micron Technology shares plunge 13% as global chip selloff deepens amid AI valuation concerns
articles.summary: Micron Technology shares dropped 13% amid concerns over chip stock valuations and slowing AI memory chip production by SK Hynix, leading to a significant decline in semiconductor stocks.&nbsp;

articles.title: Why is Qualcomm stock tumbling today?
articles.summary: Qualcomm (QCOM) shares dropped nearly 9.8% due to a broad selloff in AI and semiconductor stocks, originating in Asia. The decline was intensified by Bank of America Securities maintaining an "Underperform" rating despite a raised price target, citing hyper-competition in the AI data center market. Additionally, investor concerns arose from reports of Qualcomm's potential acquisition of AI chip startup Modular Inc. for $4 billion, adding to balance-sheet risk.

articles.title: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight Rating for Boston Scientific (BSX)
articles.summary: Piper Sandler has maintained an Overweight rating for Boston Scientific (BSX) despite reducing its target price from $90 to $65, citing a slowdown in key indicators and the company's long-standing revenue growth target. Similarly, BTIG also lowered its price target to $65 and upheld a Buy rating, attributing this to expected slower growth in the company’s Watchman line and low visibility for Q2 and Q3 sales. Both analysts anticipate a gradual recovery for Boston Scientific by 2027.

articles.title: Trump ETF trend continues as Truth Social God Bless America fund relaunched
articles.summary: The Truth Social God Bless America ETF (YALL), part of the Truth.fi fintech subsidiary of Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. (DJT), has been relaunched by Yorkville America Equities. This actively-managed fund focuses on U.S. large-cap companies that avoid politically-left activism and social agendas, and it has outperformed the S&P 500 with a 3-year annualized return of 25.2%. The relaunch highlights a broader trend of increasing investor demand for actively-managed ETFs.

articles.title: SpaceX Slides Amid Tech Selloff; AMC Tumbles on Share Sale | Stock Movers
articles.summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Nathan Hager:

- SpaceX (SPCX) is heading towards its fourth day of losses, and is currently above its lowest trading price ($149.34 on its IPO) as it continues to approaching that figure.
- IBM (IBM) shares are climbing on news that the company and OpenAI are bringing AI to cyber defense.
- AMC Entertainment (AMC) shares are lower after the movie theater operator entered into a definitive agreement with institutional investors to sell 95.25 million shares of its common stock for gross proceeds of around $200 million. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Nasdaq tumbles more than 2% in opening trading as global tech sell-off deepens
articles.summary: Global stocks fell sharply and appeared poised to extend losses in a sell-off driven by tech heavyweights.

articles.title: Two Harbors adjourns vote on CCM sale to July 2
articles.summary: Two Harbors Investment Corp. has adjourned its special meeting to July 2, 2026, to secure more shareholder votes for its proposed $12-per-share cash sale to a CrossCountry Mortgage (CCM) affiliate. The decision comes amidst ongoing opposition from shareholders, as evidenced by SEC filings showing 54% opposition to the merger as of June 15, and an alternative offer from United Wholesale Mortgage (UWM) of $12.50 per share in cash or stock. The board continues to recommend the CCM deal, highlighting its premium over unaffected share price and tangible book value.

articles.title: Vintage photos of Beirut when it was known as the 'Paris of the Middle East'
articles.summary: Beirut, Lebanon's capital, was vibrant from the 1950s to the' 70s before a civil war ended what has been dubbed its "Golden Age."

articles.title: My family of 5 outgrew our Subaru Outback. The hybrid Mazda CX-90 might be the solution for space and cost of living.
articles.summary: Testing the Mazda CX-90 on a family trip helped me realize how much we've outgrown our current car. With twins plus another kid we need a third row.
